arts.ttl: 'I played for both Arsenal and Man City but I'm only loyal to one of my former clubs'
arts.sum: Arsenal play host to Manchester City in the Premier League this afternoon, and one ex-player who represented both clubs will be rooting on one in particular after revealing where his loyalty lies

arts.ttl: Cunha transfer latest with contract update amid Arsenal release clause message
arts.sum: Cunha could not have made it more clear message to potential suitors that he had agreed a new contract at Wolves after repeatedly gesturing he was not going anywhere when celebrating his goal against Aston Villa. Wolves star Matheus Cunha has been linked with a January transfer to the likes of Arsenal and Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Samir Nasri's four-word comment about Arsene Wenger after leaving Arsenal summed him up

arts.ttl: Sesko and Tel in, Jesus among three sold - Arsenal alternative transfer window
arts.sum: As things stand, Arsenal having any new arrivals following Monday, February 3 is unlikely but an alternate transfer window could have seen up to five moves sanctioned. The 19-year-old looks set to remain in Germany, but again due to injuries, minutes would have most definitely been coming his way had he made the switch to north London.
